title: TVBridge Signal
description: Canonical signal schema for TradingView alerts routed through TVBridge.

alert_id.description: Unique identifier for this alert instance.

strategy_id.description: Identifier for the strategy that generated this signal.

account_tag.description: Tag to match against routing rules for account targeting.

symbol.description: Instrument symbol as sent by TradingView.

entry_price.description: Entry price for LIMIT/STOP orders. Null for MARKET.

lot_size.description: Position size in lots. Mutually exclusive with risk_percent.

risk_percent.description: Risk as percentage of account balance. Mutually exclusive with lot_size.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of signal generation.
